raw_cv_text:
Karim El-Sayed
+44 7911 564 287 | Email: karim.elsayed@gmail.com | LinkedIn: karim-el-sayed | GitHub: KarimElSayed |
https://karim.dev
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | MSc Computing (Distributed Systems) 2018–2019
Graduated with Distinction (78% average); thesis on "Optimizing React concurrent rendering for
low-latency financial dashboards" published at PeerJ Computer Science, achieving 340+ citations
Led the Imperial Coding Society as Secretary (2018–2019), grew membership from 180 to 480+
members and organized 8 industry speaker events including talks by engineers from Google Brain
and DeepMind
University of Amsterdam | BSc Computer Science 2014–2017
Graduated top 8% of cohort (GPA 3.87/4.0); honors thesis on "Node.js cluster optimization for
microservices" selected for publication in IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering
President of the Open Source Community Club (2016–2017), mentored 12 junior developers and
maintained 3 active packages with 50K+ combined monthly downloads on npm
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Senior Full-Stack Engineer 2021–Present
Architected and shipped a new payments reconciliation dashboard in React + Node.js (GraphQL),
serving 40K+ daily active merchants; reduced transaction settlement latency by 340ms (42%
improvement) through optimized database queries and Redis caching, saving $2.1M annually in
payment processing delays
Led migration of 12 legacy REST endpoints to GraphQL, reducing frontend API payload sizes by
64% (avg. 340KB → 120KB per request) and decreasing Time To Interactive (TTI) from 2.8s to 1.1s
across 15M+ monthly users
Mentored 6 junior engineers across 3 continents; designed and taught a 6-week full-stack Node.js
masterclass, improving team throughput by 28% and reducing code review cycles from 4 days to 1.2
days
Figma | Full-Stack Engineer II 2019–2021
Built real-time collaboration engine for Figma's design files using WebSockets + Node.js, supporting
8K+ concurrent users per server with <50ms latency; improved multiplayer sync accuracy from
94.2% to 99.7% by implementing CRDT-based conflict resolution
Optimized React component rendering pipeline using React.memo, useMemo, and code-splitting;
reduced bundle size from 780KB to 240KB (69% reduction), achieving 3.2s initial load time
(Lighthouse Performance: 94), directly attributing to 12% increase in daily signups
Owned infrastructure for multi-region deployment (AWS EC2, Kubernetes); implemented load
balancing and auto-scaling that reduced p99 response time from 890ms to 180ms under peak load
(8000 req/s), and achieved 99.98% uptime SLA
Shopify | Full-Stack Engineer 2017–2019
Developed customer analytics dashboard (React frontend, Node.js + Express backend) used by
120K+ store owners; engineered data pipeline processing 2.1B+ events/day, cut query response times
from 8.2s to 340ms through indexing and query optimization
Contributed to Polaris design system; created 8 reusable React components used across 50+ internal
applications, reducing UI development time by 35% and standardizing accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA
compliance) across Shopify's platform
Built and maintained Node.js webhook delivery system handling 580M+ webhooks/month with
99.97% delivery success rate; designed async queue architecture using Bull.js that scaled from 2K to
45K throughput (webhooks/sec) without service degradation
Wise | Junior Full-Stack Engineer 2015–2017
Implemented real-time currency exchange rate feeds using Node.js EventEmitter and WebSocket,
delivering sub-500ms updates to 200K+ concurrent users; reduced customer churn by 8% through
improved UX responsiveness
Created React-based admin dashboard for monitoring transfers across 180+ currency corridors;
engineered backend REST API (Node.js + PostgreSQL) handling 12K req/s with <200ms latency at
p99
Optimized database queries across 15 high-traffic endpoints, reducing median query time from 920ms
to 120ms (87% improvement); implemented connection pooling and query caching, increasing
throughput from 3.2K to 18K req/s
PROJECTS
LLMCache | React, Node.js, Redis, TypeScript 2023–Present
Open-source semantic caching layer for LLM API calls (Node.js + Redis backend); reduces
redundant API calls by 67% through vector similarity matching, cutting inference costs by
$340K/month for enterprise users
GitHub: 4,200+ stars, 210+ forks; 18K+ weekly npm downloads; benchmarks show 5.2x faster
response times vs. traditional key-value caching; featured on ProductHunt with 2.8K upvotes
ReactFlow Pro | React, TypeScript, Canvas API 2022–Present
Visual node-and-edge graph editor library for React; 6,800+ GitHub stars, 340+ contributors, 92K+
weekly downloads; used by Zapier, Retool, and 15+ Fortune 500 companies for workflow automation
Optimized rendering with virtual scrolling and WebWorker offloading; achieves 60fps on 10K+ node
graphs (96% rendering improvement), and <80ms interaction latency even with complex node
operations
ServerSync | Node.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, PostgreSQL 2021–2022
End-to-end encrypted document sync engine; 1,200+ GitHub stars; enables offline-first applications
with automatic conflict resolution and merkle-tree based delta compression
Reduces network bandwidth by 78% through binary delta encoding; syncs 50MB+ documents in
<2.1s over 3G networks; used in production by 3 privacy-focused startups serving 180K+ users
BenchMark | Node.js, Express, React, InfluxDB 2020–2021
Cloud-native performance benchmarking framework for Node.js/React applications; 820+ GitHub
stars, 4.2K weekly npm downloads; automated regression detection and historical trend analysis
across 12 metrics
Integrated with CI/CD (GitHub Actions, CircleCI); tracks latency, throughput, memory usage, bundle
size with <1% overhead; helped clients identify performance regressions within 5 minutes (vs.
manual 2-hour investigation)
EXTRACURRICULAR
React Amsterdam & Node.js Conf EU | Keynote Speaker & Workshop Facilitator 2021–2023
Delivered 2 keynote talks: "Scaling React at 100M+ Users" (React Amsterdam 2023, 1,200+
attendees, 340K+ YouTube views) and "Advanced Node.js Patterns for Distributed Systems" (Node.js
Conf 2022, 680+ live attendees)
Hosted 6 hands-on workshops teaching full-stack React + Node.js architecture; 280+ attendees across
events with 4.8/5 average satisfaction rating; 1 workshop published as O'Reilly training course (12K+
enrollments)
Node.js Foundation & npm Maintainer Community | Open Source Maintainer & 2019–
Mentor Present
Active maintainer of 4 npm packages with 180K+ combined weekly downloads (published 28
releases across projects); processed 340+ pull requests and triaged 580+ GitHub issues, maintaining
<48-hour response SLA
Mentored 8 junior developers becoming open-source contributors; 3 mentees now maintain their own
packages with 50K+ downloads; designed mentorship program adopted by Node.js Foundation for
40+ participants
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, SQL, GraphQL, HTML5, CSS3
Technologies – React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, GraphQL, WebSockets, PostgreSQL, Redis,
MongoDB, AWS (EC2, RDS, S3, Lambda), Kubernetes, Docker, Git
Tools – VS Code, Chrome DevTools, Jest, Webpack, Vite, GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Datadog, New
Relic, Figma, Postman, Jira, Slack
name: Karim El-Sayed
